subcodes.first_line: God willing, may ye at all times be engaged in remembrance of the Peerless Beloved, and through the aid of His Name partake of the wine of divine knowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله در کل اوان بذکر محبوب یکتا مشغول باشید و رحیق عرفان را باعانت اسم
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @consolation and comfort, @presence of; reunion with God, @spiritual transformation, @call to action
